issue.title: www.cbsnews.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.cbsnews.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cbsnews.com%2F) ### Comment > I have never not had a problem with regards to cbsnews.com, in that over the years, it has always known that AdGuard is blocking their ads. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1oda6hv3e1z48c0ckg8ss4cgwksow80jnk6s2pzbrc.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.18 System version: | `iOS 26.4.1` License type: | free Advanced protection: | disabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter Custom filters: | `I do not see filter names on iOS AdGuard app.` DNS filtering: | disabled Other extensions used: | `None`
